seo.description: Every Business Work Gets Done with AI

home.heroSubtitle: Every Business Work Gets Done with AI
home.demoTitle: Practical AI Automation with Full Transparency & Clear Cost Tracking

services.title: Practical AI Services & Solutions
services.subtitle: We offer structured consulting to find high-impact automation, and fast, transparent implementation to make it real.

platform.title: AI Consulting & Process Assessment
platform.description: Direct collaboration to analyze workflows, identify automation opportunities, and deliver a transparent implementation roadmap.
platform.metric: Clear reports with cost & time estimates

platform.title: AI Implementation
platform.description: Professional software engineering process from requirements to handover, combining custom AI with pre-built components.

agents.title: Intelligent Document Extraction
agents.description: Extracts key data from invoices, contracts, and forms using a multi-engine OCR cascade. Every field carries bounding box citations for verifiable trust.

agents.title: Basic Voice Agent
agents.description: Handles front desk operations: answers calls, takes messages, and manages simple bookings automatically.

agents.title: OpenClaw AI Agent
agents.description: Handles multi-step back-office tasks including data processing, validation, and automated notifications.

agents.title: Steve (BPO Agent)
agents.description: Dedicated BPO Data Processing Agent built for multi-tenant, high-volume document environments.

agents.title: Simple Workflow Automator
agents.description: Connects email ingestion, data extraction, human approval, and system updates into a seamless flow.

vision.title: Designed for impact across key industries
vision.painSubtitle: Our agents are portable. Run them in our managed cloud, your own servers, or via an edge AI Box depending on your data sovereignty needs.

sectors.title: Banking & Finance
sectors.description: Automating retail banking systems and secure KYC/KYB document processing.

sectors.title: Insurance
sectors.description: Streamlining claims, P&C operations, and intelligent document extraction.

sectors.title: Manufacturing & Logistics
sectors.description: Automating supply chain workflows, front desk operations, and invoicing.

sectors.title: BPO / Digital Services
sectors.description: Empowering back-office operations with multi-step data processing agents.

about.title: Our Strategic Moat
about.subtitle: We win by being inspectable. Transparent costs, domain depth, and verifiable outputs.

references.title: The Transparency Promise
references.subtitle: No hidden fees or black boxes
references.challenge: Many AI projects fail due to hidden token costs and opaque progress tracking.
references.solution: We track per-call costs from day one and provide detailed milestone reports for every project.

references.title: Verifiable Trust Architecture
references.subtitle: Bbox + citation infrastructure
references.challenge: Regulated industries cannot adopt AI if outputs are not verifiable.
references.solution: Every extracted field carries page-level coordinates, ensuring users can verify every claim instantly.

about.teamSubtitle: Over 20+ years of hands-on experience in leading digital transformation and operational excellence.

team.name: Thomas Nguyen
team.bio: Former CEO of DIGI-TEXX and COO of Innovature BPO, with 20+ years of leadership at HSBC and Standard Chartered. Thomas combines deep operational acumen with AI to bring practical, cost-effective automation to SMBs.

pillars.title: Business Expertise
pillars.desc: We understand the nuances of Banking, Logistics, and BPO operations.

pillars.title: Technical Depth
pillars.desc: Lightweight engineering, custom Python + Celery for production scale.

pillars.title: Practical Focus
pillars.desc: We favor deterministic tools and smart agents over flashy demos.

contact.title: Book a Discovery Call
contact.prompt: Ready to explore practical AI automation for your business? Drop your details and we will discuss high-impact opportunities.
